data.title: Add type-check gate to brainstorm SKILL.md for non-epic ticket detection
data.description:
Modify plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md to add:

1. A new "## Type Detection Gate" section after Usage and before Phase 1 that:
   - Runs .claude/scripts/dso ticket show <id> to check the ticket_type field
   - If ticket_type is epic: proceed to Phase 1 unchanged (a pre-flight type check is added for all invocations, but epic dialogue and output behavior is semantically unchanged)
   - If not epic (story, task, bug): present two options:
     (a) Convert to epic — close original as superseded, run full brainstorm flow
     (b) Enrich in-place — run streamlined enrichment dialogue
2. Update Usage section to show non-epic invocation:
   /dso:brainstorm <ticket-id>      # Works with any ticket type (epic, story, task, bug)
3. Preserve the existing epic dialogue and output unchanged
4. Remove RED marker [test_type_gate_section_exists] from .test-index after tests pass (keep the test entry itself)

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (add Type Detection Gate section, update Usage)
- MODIFY: .test-index (remove RED marker from brainstorm SKILL.md line)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 tests in test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] SKILL.md contains type detection gate section
  Verify: grep -q 'Type Detection Gate\|ticket_type' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate checks ticket type via ticket show command
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket show' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate presents convert and enrich options for non-epics
  Verify: grep -qi 'convert.*epic\|enrich.*in.place' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate preserves epic dialogue flow to Phase 1
  Verify: grep -qi 'epic.*Phase 1\|epic.*proceed\|epic.*unchanged' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_type_gate_section_exists\]' .test-index
- [ ] Test entry (without marker) still exists in .test-index
  Verify: grep -q 'test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh' .test-index
- [ ] Skill file is valid markdown
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] No broken internal references
  Verify: grep -oE '\$REPO_ROOT/[^ )\`]+|\.claude/scripts/dso' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | sort -u | while read p; do case "\$p" in .claude/scripts/dso) test -f "\$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/scripts/dso" || echo "MISSING: \$p" ;; *) test -e "\$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/\${p#\\\$REPO_ROOT/}" || echo "MISSING: \$p" ;; esac; done | grep -c MISSING | awk '{exit (\$1 > 0)}'
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
